title: 'Humiliated, broken, powerless': Sudan enters fourth year of war
description: While parts of Sudan's capital show fragile signs of life, across the country the conflict between the army and a rival paramilitary continues to drive mass displacement, hunger and allegations of atrocities.

title: Sexual Violence Has Become the ‘Defining Feature’ of the World’s Worst Humanitarian Crisis
description: “Apart from the rapes, they beat us with sticks and pointed guns at my head,” one woman in Sudan told Doctors Without Borders about the violence against women amid the country’s ongoing civil war.

title: Sudan war ‘being fought on women’s bodies’: Survivors detail sexual assault
description: In a new report, Doctors Without Borders says sexual violence is the ‘defining feature’ of the conflict in Sudan.

title: After three years of war, what is the situation like in Sudan?
description: Sudan’s war has displaced millions and caused thousands of deaths, with no clear end in sight to the ongoing violence.

title: How I harness research to inform humanitarian relief efforts
description: As a social scientist at Médecins Sans Frontières, Beverley Stringer researches the many non-medical factors that affect health during emergencies.

title: Sudanese rebels using rape as a weapon of war ‘in a pattern of deliberate tactics designed to humiliate and terrorise’, says NGO
description: Thousands of women and girls in Sudan have sought treatment after surviving sexual violence in the country’s civil war, Doctors Without Borders has found, in what it called “a pattern of deliberate tactics designed to humiliate and terrorise”.

title: The Man Who Shaped Washington’s View of the Middle East

title: Trump's VA killed a home loan program. Vets are now losing their homes because of it
description: Foreclosures on VA loans are at their highest level in a decade. VA has a fix but it is months away and could still leave vets worse off than most other homeowners.
